source_pr.title: executor: fix unstable TestCoprocessorOOMAction
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #19677 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

For asserting OOMAction in `TestCoprocessorOOMAction`, the testcase for the non keep-order is unstable as the `quota` might be not enough to support the whole query processing.

What's Changed:
Mock the consume data to make `TestCoprocessorOOMAction` stable.

How it Works:

- Unit test

Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

* No release note

evidence: add failpoint `testRateLimitActionMockConsume` to mock mem-tracker consumption + tune quota to deterministic values (executor/executor_test.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go)
